'''Baintorf''' was a [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] officer.

==Biography==
During [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], Baintorf held rank of [[General/Legends|General]], commanding the units responsible for [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] [[Planetary shield/Legends|planetary shield]]. When the [[Yevetha]]n [[Aramadia-class thrustship|thrustship]] [[Aramadia (Aramadia-class)|''Aramadia'']] broke off negotiations with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and made an unauthorized launch to return to [[N'zoth]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]] ordered Baintorf to raise the planetary shield to prevent the ''Aramadia''{{'s}} passage and for the [[Nebula-class Star Destroyer|''Nebula''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Brilliant (Nebula-class)|''Brilliant'']] to shadow the ''Aramadia'' while it held position underneath the shield. When [[Nil Spaar]] protested that this was an illegal violation of his right of free passage, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] ordered General Baintorf to lower the shield and to allow the ''Aramadia'' to escape.<ref name="Before the Storm" />

{{Char-stub}}
